{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322070820BDD8B991226D6D6BF2CF"}"},"total":1646},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401796252743009048","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实还行，虽然前期似乎感觉有点憋屈，但到后期这个憋屈也能解释回来。总而言之我觉得挺好。人物的描写虽然有点标签化，但是总体人物智商在线。另外就是前期会有5个开挂的，这5个开挂的其实是外来文明的内鬼，具体内容大家自己看，我不多说。现在的问题就在于其实写了这么多，我觉得才刚刚进入主线，从进入这个空间到成为流浪文明的时候，我觉得都算是序章，希望作者后面能好好写，即便写不出什么花样来也能平稳落地。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723367704,"group_id":"7369072249887804440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只希望可以写出自己想写的故事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx1TWWdTE+B5Z8k4XnA3gNn6tgiQvLf+gRxkGdUdxts2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1d6022df60624332b5e11ad17e1db698~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705626&x-signature=Dst%2B0jiC0SE0tRbLutRtpFNGJ%2Fg%3D","user_id":"2252222806104999","user_name":"举杯无我"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2252222806104999","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7369072249887804440","book_info":{"abstract":"【求生】【小团队】【多世界穿梭】【无外挂】【多女主】
一觉醒来，蓝星没了
好在蓝星人来到了一个永恒列车求生游戏
一人一个列车，穿越无数世界碎片，搜集物资，挣扎求生
苏黎笑嘻了，这不是求生小说吗？我懂得，出来吧，我的签到系统！提示系统！暴击强化系统！
无尽外挂，出来！
但是什么都没有发生。
苏黎懵逼了，啥？我堂堂穿越者，没有外挂？没挂这求生游戏能玩？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e16c901280bcee8f172ea1525b7ffbb5","author":"苍蓝圣歌","author_id":"","book_id":"7369072249887804440","book_name":"列车求生：你真求生啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7369072864286212632","read_count":"26195","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1438733"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"670","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,诸天万界,多女主,求生,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/e1a8d1f54e75eb32071b07e1d3184293~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318501&x-signature=M%2BDS7kYey%2BSvjmhRJLnm2ZSyUrQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4189575399345368","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"114"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322070820BDD8B991226D6D6BF2CF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读50分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3004,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16960},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598480957148922649","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"刚开始觉得作者把“金手指”这种爽文要点砍了会写不好，就算韩立这种凡人流也有小绿瓶当金手指。
不过看下去反而感觉挺有意思的，主角相对于其他玩家来说运气还行，没死于几次大的文明级灾难，稳扎稳打的发育下去爽点比起系统流来说也不算逊色。
最大的亮点是每个新世界碎片的生态系统和各种构思合理的生物群落，感觉就好像真有这样一个世界一样。
整体剧情发展上也很不错，故事线很清晰，感情线处理也没有莫名其妙的桥段，至少感情的推进符合正常逻辑，看着很舒服
目前追读到630章左右，可以说是一本不错的求生文小说","text_exts":[{"e":126,"s":123,"text":"新世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741345016D6BF2CF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227598480957148922649%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227369072249887804440%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769163780,"group_id":"7369072249887804440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxjwvHIQi/QpOiZ99lx0dJyoat0yfYBFIL7MIHBAvC6C","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4023840145158795","user_name":"元始天撙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4023840145158795","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1759204743,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7369072249887804440","book_info":{"abstract":"【求生】【小团队】【多世界穿梭】【无外挂】【多女主】
一觉醒来，蓝星没了
好在蓝星人来到了一个永恒列车求生游戏
一人一个列车，穿越无数世界碎片，搜集物资，挣扎求生
苏黎笑嘻了，这不是求生小说吗？我懂得，出来吧，我的签到系统！提示系统！暴击强化系统！
无尽外挂，出来！
但是什么都没有发生。
苏黎懵逼了，啥？我堂堂穿越者，没有外挂？没挂这求生游戏能玩？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e16c901280bcee8f172ea1525b7ffbb5","author":"苍蓝圣歌","author_id":"","book_id":"7369072249887804440","book_name":"列车求生：你真求生啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7369072864286212632","read_count":"26195","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1438733"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"670","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,诸天万界,多女主,求生,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/e1a8d1f54e75eb32071b07e1d3184293~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318501&x-signature=M%2BDS7kYey%2BSvjmhRJLnm2ZSyUrQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4189575399345368","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"686"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322070820BDD8B991226D6D6BF2CF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":88779,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9098},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7539515946286711576","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到四十章，简单评价一下：
总体来说，读着蛮舒服的，不急不缓，文笔不错。但要注意这不是爽文，喜欢爽点多的读起来也许会感到枯燥。
优点是：看得出来用心写了，比如对于第二个世界副本的魔物繁衍习惯的描写，以及对各个神明赐福的设计；笔力不错，没有那种很尬或者很突兀的点，剧情基本挺合理的；读着还是比较有趣味的。
缺点是：爽点少；节奏较缓；个别地方写的比较疵，还能更好一些
总体来说，这是本不错的书，我自己读着还是挺舒服的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755435000,"group_id":"7369072249887804440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3WtKTSPojs1lVq5lKKNhSKd43YXtOFv/6sUwzQiysTw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1289078166534925","user_name":"爱吃小老鼠酒的叶三"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1289078166534925","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7369072249887804440","book_info":{"abstract":"【求生】【小团队】【多世界穿梭】【无外挂】【多女主】
